series_metadata.series_title: PUCO Docketing Division Daily Activity (Report) and/or daily filings.
series_metadata.series_description: The PUCO issues the Report electronically and on paper to list the filings it receives each day. The PUCO also attaches the daily filings to the Report or provides the daily filings to the OCC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Report and/or daily filings in paper no longer of administrative value, and
